div.head: The Secretary of State to the Consul at Seville (Bay)
div.p: Please get in touch orally and informally with General Queipo de Llano and inform him that the military authorities at Vigo do not permit our Consulate there to send or receive cipher telegrams and that we should be grateful if appropriate instructions could be transmitted at once to the authorities there directing them to permit such communications freely to pass between the Department and our Consul at Vigo.By telegram November 5, 10 p.m., the Consul at Seville reported to the Department: “General Queipo de Llano informed me tonight that General Franco promised him during a conversation by telephone to arrange for the freedom of communication with the Consul, Vigo, desired by the Department.” (352.1115/2167)
